blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Add validation for setup/teardown time inclusion
Verify that setup/teardown time is included in the booking confirmation.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate whether the setup/teardown time is included or added, as specified in the requirement. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions that setup starts at 2pm, but it does not explicitly state that this time is included in the booking or if it is an additional requirement, indicating a gap in the implementation.
gaps: No evidence confirming that setup/teardown time is included or added in the booking process.
